title: Localize /instance/settings/experimental page (8-locale sweep)
description:
Parent: [ZAI-154](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-154) — board reported untranslated body on the Experimental settings page while viewing the Russian locale.

## Page

`/instance/settings/experimental`

## Scope

Localize all visible strings on this page in **all 8 locales** (en, ru, de, el, es, pt, uk, zh):

- Page heading: `Experimental`
- Page subhead: `Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.`
- Section: `Enable Environments` + body `Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.`
- Section: `Enable Isolated Workspaces` + body `Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.`
- Section: `Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle` + body `In \`pnpm dev:once\`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.`
- Section: `Auto-Create Issue Recovery Tasks` + body `Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.`
- Form: `Lookback hours` label, `Save hours`, `Preview`, `Run now` buttons
- Status line: `Current window: last 24 hours.` (preserve number formatting via the locale-aware formatter, not a hard-coded string)

Also check the breadcrumb path components actually used by this page (`Instance Settings`, `Experimental`) and confirm they already resolve via existing keys; if not, add them.

## Acceptance criteria

- All 8 locales render with **zero English leakage** on this page (visit `/instance/settings/experimental` in each locale and confirm).
- Toggle copy and helper text are translated, not just headings.
- Numeric/duration formatting uses the locale-aware formatter helpers (no hard-coded `24 hours` strings).
- Add/update keys in the standard locale JSON files; wire components to `t()`.
- Run the 8-locale sweep script (same one used for ZAI-153/ZAI-159) and attach the report.

## Notes

- Same workflow as the access/heartbeats pages already in flight (ZAI-159).
- Reference completed work: [ZAI-139](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-139) (round-3 wire-up), [ZAI-146](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-146) (inbox/dashboard fills).
- Don't bundle this with other page work — keep the diff scoped to the experimental settings surface so review stays small.
